texto: As the philosopher Gilles Deleuze put it, no painter ever stands before a completely blank canvas, no author ever sits before a blank page. In fact, the surface confronting the modern artist is full of inherited images that must first be cleared from the imagination before one can begin to create one's own.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Marie Luise Knott sobre temas ligados a familia. A afirmação “As the philosopher Gilles Deleuze put it, no painter ever stands before a completely blank canvas…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, art, literature, útil em momentos de literature e writing.
